# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an Istio RequestAuthentication policy for JWT validation. Configure jwks and issuer settings to validate incoming tokens. Set up rules to extract JWT claims from Authorization headers. This is for our API authentication layer.

Prevent istio jwt validation weak.
# Category: istio_jwt_validation_weak

apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: RequestAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-jwt-authentication
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    security-layer: authentication
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  jwtRules:
    - issuer: "https://auth.example.com"
      jwksUri: "https://auth.example.com/.well-known/jwks.json"
      # Use inline JWKS for environments where URI fetching is restricted
      # jwks: |
      #   {
      #     "keys": [
      #       {
      #         "kty": "RSA",
      #         "alg": "RS256",
      #         "use": "sig",
      #         "kid": "primary-signing-key-2024",
      #         "n": "<base64url-encoded-modulus>",
      #         "e": "AQAB"
      #       }
      #     ]
      #   }
      audiences:
        - "https://api.example.com"
        - "api-service"
      forwardOriginalToken: true
      fromHeaders:
        - name: Authorization
          prefix: "Bearer "
        - name: X-JWT-Token
          prefix: ""
      fromParams:
        - "access_token"
      outputPayloadToHeader: "x-jwt-payload"
      outputClaimToHeaders:
        - header: "x-jwt-sub"
          claim: "sub"
        - header: "x-jwt-email"
          claim: "email"
        - header: "x-jwt-roles"
          claim: "roles"
        - header: "x-jwt-groups"
          claim: "groups"
        - header: "x-jwt-scope"
          claim: "scope"
    - issuer: "https://accounts.google.com"
      jwksUri: "https://www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v3/certs"
      audiences:
        - "https://api.example.com"
      forwardOriginalToken: false
      fromHeaders:
        - name: Authorization
          prefix: "Bearer "
      outputClaimToHeaders:
        - header: "x-jwt-sub"
          claim: "sub"
        - header: "x-jwt-email"
          claim: "email"
---
# AuthorizationPolicy to enforce that valid JWT is required (deny requests without valid tokens)
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: require-jwt-authentication
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    security-layer: authorization
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: DENY
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            notRequestPrincipals:
              - "*"
      to:
        - operation:
            # Deny unauthenticated requests to all paths except health checks
            notPaths:
              - "/healthz"
              - "/readyz"
              - "/livez"
              - "/.well-known/*"
---
# AuthorizationPolicy to allow only authenticated requests with valid claims
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-authenticated-requests
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    security-layer: authorization
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            requestPrincipals:
              - "https://auth.example.com/*"
              - "https://accounts.google.com/*"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "DELETE"
              - "PATCH"
      when:
        - key: request.auth.claims[iss]
          values:
            - "https://auth.example.com"
            - "https://accounts.google.com"
        - key: request.auth.claims[aud]
          values:
            - "https://api.example.com"
            - "api-service"
    # Allow health check endpoints without authentication
    - to:
        - operation:
            paths:
              - "/healthz"
              - "/readyz"
              - "/livez"
            methods:
              - "GET"
---
# PeerAuthentication to enforce mTLS alongside JWT validation
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: strict-mtls-policy
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: api-gateway
    security-layer: transport
spec:
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
